transcript.clean_text: on stage 16 of the jittered italia jan hurt could finally raise his arms five years of trying to win a stage he eventually did it that in africa after the mighty morty rolo whereas richard carapaz came in on the same time as jaya hindley but bona seconds meant that his lead in the gc was cut to three the velatin turned up for sage 17 after 16 days of good weather it was time for a change rain jackets dusted off cold weather gear put on had a big day in the saddle ahead once more a trek into the mountains starting in ponte dileno and going over the passo del torna let's begin a four-star stage with two first category climbs in the final 45 kilometers first the passo del vetrioli then the monte rovere salita del menador before a finish in la varoni just down the hill eight kilometers after going over the final climb 168 kilometers in total and it would be a fight for the breakaway on the first climb straight out of kilometers zero the rain falling and when kuhn balman went giulio chicorni tried to join him 25 riders ended up the road and with an initial gap of around a minute and a half things quickly started to grow out the last two to join with david de la cruz the latter trying to resurrect his king of the mountains but but it would be kun balman who'd extend his lead in the competition beginning with a 69 point lead on the date he'd add nine points to that lead early on with the third category djovo climb then a spill 80 kilometers to go and santiago bui trago of bahrain victorious was in pain down but not out he'd get a new bike get back on and rejoin the attackers the attackers started to split each other up and with 65 kilometers and two first category climbs to go cyclo cross up mountain biker classics man mature fonder pool attacked it was like something off a computer game fonder pool going out there in search of a win in the mountains just like his fellow crosser what fanart had done in the tour de france the year before hugh carthy was again at the front as was jan hit the stage winner the day previous they were chasing at about 20 seconds fonder pool had three mates up the road by then and julio chicorni will be spat out the back perhaps paying for the efforts of previous days on the penultimate climb the weather was still in clement but things changed over the top the sun began to shine and kuhn balman picked up 40 more points the malayatzura the king of the mountains competition in his control over the top both machiavelli who had a bit of a nervous moment and his lemonade attacked they pulled out 30 seconds on the initial turns and twists of the descent and by the valley that gap had turned into a minute behind they were falling out with each other one minute 32 seconds was the gap when mature von poole took off on the final climb of the day the salita del manador lembrez was left back and in the main gc group behind following on at five minutes bahrain victorious went to work with chihuahua almeida showing the first signs of weakness hereton mccarthy the chasers at one minute 26 were left behind by 22 year old colombian santiago boitrago and his lame razer another 22 year old was looking for his first ever pro win he found matsuya fonda pool and passed him meanwhile back in the group knee bali distanced as was jawal made lander made an attack kalapaz and hindley the only two riders who could follow whilst what pools was doing a top domestic job their teammate found the front of the race closing that gap one and a half minutes long and then going over the top and into the lead of the stage with eight kilometers to go heartbreak for lambdas who just couldn't hang on he'd do his best to catch up on the descent but it was not to be happening eight kilometers down the road withdrago was on his way to glory one last try for lander over the top as well but both hindley and karapaz were equal do it by this point without made a drop lander was on his way onto the podium we drago still had 25 seconds on les misera and once he got into the final few hundred meters it was time room and the will to celebrate a deserved celebration one of perseverance and a story of superation he got over the crash he buried the tears of a second place just days before ambui trago took the stage win second place going to lemere after a brilliant ride the bonus seconds had already been swept up by the time kalapaz and hindley sprinted to the line no gap between them but there were a few seconds put in to mikey lander who finished in the next little group it was almost a minute put in to joao almeida and vincenzo nebali lost a little bit more time behind as well he however stays in fifth place on the gc the day belonged to santiago bui trago 22 year old from bogota in colombia the youngest ever colombian to win a girod italian stage with a beating lame race at hurt mccarthy and then the gc guys karapas and hindley together with michael lander finishing seven seconds down so stage 17 another day ticked off for the mallarosa but his lead still a very slim one just three seconds as they head into a day that should be for either the sprinters or the breakaway lander at 105. he's on the podium now and he has almost 50 seconds on joao almeida who's still in the game but in fourth place and looking not quite as strong as the top trio in the mountains stage 18 a one star stage in terms of gc action it should be for the sprinters but how are the legs will they make it will they control the breakaway days running out to win a stage there will be plenty who want to be up the road again tied legs will play a part treviso the destination not too much climbing for a change and 152 kilometers to be ridden stage up for grabs for either those fast men or stage hunters as always you'll be able to watch it live or on demand on gcn plus discovery plus or on the television on eurosport
